projects.name: Cosmic Rays
projects.description: Professional-grade granular processor. Engineered for infinite sonic exploration as a native AU/VST3/LV2 plugin.

projects.name: Tape Echo
projects.description: 20-head virtual tape loop with physics-modeled mechanical instability. C++23 DSP engine based on legendary hardware.

projects.name: Physical Hardware
projects.description: Bespoke guitar effects and signal processors. Analog souls with digital precision. Enclosures currently in fabrication.

projects.name: Omnichord Mods
projects.description: Expanding the sonic range of the OM-84 and OM-36. MIDI implementation, CV control, and custom filter stacks.

projects.name: Awesome Omnichord
projects.description: A curated collection of resources for the Suzuki Omnichord. Technical specs, repair guides, and community history for the world's most dreamy instrument.

projects.name: Casa Occidente
projects.description: Professional audio workflow automation and plugin development. Experts in intelligent audio riding and high-precision signal processing.
